en_body:
There shall be one night of Peace
when boundaries shall no longer have meaning...
everything shall open wide:
the doors of the house
the gates of the gardens
and every barrier between Consciousness and Spirit.
There shall be one night of Blessed Peace
softly stirring every soul awake
all joined as One, all feeling through spiritual vision:
the awaited night when humanity is no more
only Poetry remains—a Loving-Kindness never known...
note: The poem's awaited night braids the Christian promise of peace with a Buddhist dissolution of boundaries into compassionate Oneness.
